No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to poverty eradication.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly addresses domestic violence and child abuse, which directly impact physical and mental health, aligning with Target 3.4. Model B's original evidence was slightly more comprehensive.
